name: Mango Bowl with Coconut
intro: My favorite topping, particularly with mango, is large coconut chips. They provide such wonderful crunch against the smooth cream. If you want an even creamier bowl, use coconut cream only. For a chilled version, use frozen mango.

ingredients.item: frozen mango, or a scant ½ cup (1 dl) dried and soaked mango
Lemon oil or grated lemon peel (optional)

method: If you’re using dehydrated mango, soak it in water for 2 to 8 hours. Blend all the ingredients (except toppings) to a smooth cream and pour into two bowls. Top with sliced banana and sliced strawberries, coconut chips, and grated lemon peel.
